_comment: Coverage ratchet floor (W1-T25, MASTER-PLAN §5 TIER 2 gate 1/4). Captured from remudero's own test suite (src/** only, test/** excluded) via `node --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-exclude=test/** --test-reporter=lcov`. Never lower these numbers to make a PR pass -- raise them (ratchet up) when coverage genuinely improves; a coverage-lowering PR must go CI-red on scripts/coverage-ratchet.mjs.
